flashcards.definition: Found by setting the numerator equal to zero (after canceling common factors).
f(0) = (numerator evaluated at 0)/(denominator evaluated at 0), if defined.
Divide the number line at zeros and VAs; test the sign of f in each interval.
f(−x) = f(x); graph is symmetric about the y-axis.
f(−x) = −f(x); graph is symmetric about the origin.
